name: SecurityOfNodeCalculateAuthenticator
title: SecurityOfNodeCalculateAuthenticator
syntax: long SecurityOfNodeCalculateAuthenticator(char nodeName[], char networkName[], dword dataId, byte payload[], dword payloadLength, qword truncatedAuthenticatorHigh, qword truncatedAuthenticator, dword truncatedAuthenticatorBitLength, qword freshness, dword truncatedFreshnessBitLength, dword freshnessValueBitLength, dword freshnessValueId)
description: Calculate the authenticator from arbitrary data. The (complete) freshness value must be provided in the function call. Other freshness sources will be ignored. The method returns the truncated freshness via freshness' parameter. The calculated authenticator is returned via the TruncatedAuthenticator parameter. The truncated bit lengths of the authenticator and freshness can be modified.
The result of this method depends on the security profile which is mapped on the network.
You have to call SecurityLocalStartControlSimulationNode before this callback is called.

parameters.name: networkName
parameters.description: The name of the network the node is on.

parameters.name: char networkName[]
parameters.description: The name of the network the node is on.

parameters.name: dword dataId
parameters.description: The data ID of the PDU to lookup the desired key in the security source.

parameters.name: dword payloadLength
parameters.description: The payload length of the PDU in bytes.

parameters.name: qword truncatedAuthenticatorHigh [Out]
parameters.description: Upper 64 bits of the authenticator (MAC), if authenticator is larger than 64 bits.Otherwise 0;

parameters.name: qword truncatedAuthenticator [Out]
parameters.description: The full authenticator value or the lower 64 bits of the authenticator (MAC), if authenticator is larger than 64 bits.

parameters.name: dword truncatedAuthenticatorBitLength [In/Out]
parameters.description: Length of complete authenticator to transmit( length of authInfo if the authenticator is <= 64 bit, otherwise length of authInfo + authInfoHigh)

parameters.name: qword freshness [In/Out]
parameters.description: In: The freshness value for CMAC calculation. Out: Truncated freshness.

parameters.name: dword truncatedFreshnessBitLength [In/Out]
parameters.description: The length of the truncated freshness in bits.

parameters.name: dword freshnessValueBitLength
parameters.description: The freshness value length in bits.

parameters.name: dword freshnessValueId
parameters.description: The freshness value ID of the PDU.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
